description: Love poem in Judaeo-Arabic, for a woman "Sitt al-Nās" (mistress of mankind). Same hand: T-S NS 292.38 (Judaeo-Arabic), T-S NS 91.52 (Judaeo-Arabic), T-S 8K13.6 (Judaeo-Arabic), T-S Ar.37.120 (Judaeo-Arabic),  T-S NS 143.81 + T-S NS 235.135a + T-S NS 235.135b (Hebrew). And might be the same hand as the interesting letter T-S 8J15.28 (PGPID 9178).
description_he: שיר אהבה ביהודית-ערבית, לאישה בשם 'סת אל-נאס' (גברת האנושות).
